query: SELECT bl.id, bl.liver_id, bl.livestream_date, l.name, l.email FROM brand_livestreams bl LEFT JOIN livers l ON bl.liver_id = l.id WHERE l.email = 'shihomi208@gmail.com' ORDER BY bl.id DESC LIMIT 5;
